76430.subject: Aave V4 Arrives on Avalanche: A New Chapter for Onchain Lending
76430.body:
View this post on the web at https://www.team1.blog/p/aave-v4-arrives-on-avalanche-a-new

On July 15, 2026, Aave [ https://substack.com/redirect/13c3a62d-d723-4e33-82c3-9f0506f5a287?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] rolled out its V4 lending protocol on Avalanche, marking the first deployment of its redesigned architecture outside Ethereum. The move follows V4вҖҷs Ethereum debut in March and signals AaveвҖҷs plan to expand chain by chain, tailoring each deployment to ecosystems where it already has traction rather than replicating the same setup everywhere.
For Avalanche, being chosen as the first expansion beyond Ethereum reflects the networkвҖҷs combination of an established Aave lending market and a fast-growing ecosystem for tokenized real-world assets such as Treasuries and corporate bonds.
Want to keep up with the latest in the Avalanche ecosystem? Subscribe to the Team1 blog and get our updates in your inbox weekly.
What Is Aave?
Aave is one of the largest decentralized lending platforms in crypto. Unlike a bank, it isnвҖҷt run by a company holding your money and approving loans behind closed doors. It runs on smart contracts, self-executing code on a blockchain, that let people lend crypto to earn interest or borrow against crypto they own, without a middleman.
Aave has facilitated more than $1 trillion in cumulative loan volume since launching, making it one of the most established lending protocols in decentralized finance.
From Monolithic Pools to Hub and Spoke
The biggest change in V4 is architectural.
Previous versions relied on a single shared pool of funds per network. That was efficient, but it also concentrated risk: a problem with one asset could affect the whole pool.
V4 introduces a Hub and Spoke model. The Hub works like a central vault, holding reserves and managing liquidity across the network. Spokes work like individual branches, each with its own collateral rules, risk settings, and liquidation parameters, while drawing on liquidity from the Hub through controlled credit lines.
Different markets can share liquidity while the impact of problems in any single Spoke stays contained. That structure supports ordinary crypto lending, liquid staking, stablecoin markets, and eventually tokenized real-world assets, all on the same underlying capital.
Why Avalanche?
Aave first launched on Avalanche in 2021 via V2 during the Avalanche Rush incentive program, before Avalanche became one of the early networks to support Aave V3 in 2022. Since then, Aave has processed more than $15 billion in all-time cumulative inflows across V2 and V3 deployments on Avalanche [ https://substack.com/redirect/8e11ac4c-c9a6-4209-8b4f-02d2537eb678?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. Today, the V3 market supports 18 assets, with stablecoin utilization running above 90%.
That track record made Avalanche a natural candidate for V4вҖҷs debut beyond Ethereum. Avalanche has also spent the

    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/most-leveraged-market-record-adrian-pape-nqwue?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BsiyvPQdOQnqkLySlmax%2FQw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2xZkLdBbmpWYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mryrsohb~i3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mryrsohb-i3
  
Hey, it's Adrian Oil is back above $90, Iran is still escalating, and the Strait of Hormus is effectively shut again. A few months ago that mix would have sent every market into the deep red. This week the Dow was sent to a short rally literally after Trump threatened to bomb Iran again. Markets get bored of repetitive news, and this news has become very repetitive. But boredom is not the same as safety. We are sitting on the most leveraged US stock market on record, the narrowest rally in years, and a Bitcoin cycle that either follows the 4 year cycle or does whatever it wants. The classic capitulation everyone waited for did not show so far. Neither did the classic euphoria. LetвҖҷs get into the broader picture and how to set up for the coming week: Market Overview Start with energy, because everything else hangs off it. Oil pushed back above $90 as the Iran conflict escalated, with Iran striking BahrainвҖҷs datacenters and the Houthis warning Saudi Arabia theyвҖҷll make shipping harder. The quick de-escalation that was priced in, ships flowing through Hormus again, just didnвҖҷt happen. HereвҖҷs why thatвҖҷs a problem: Higher oil feeds straight into inflation expectations. The market has now started pricing rate hikes, not cuts, with a first one expected around September and a second in Dezember. Those odds move with every PCE print and every dollar on the oil price. For Europe, and Germany especially, pricier energy heading into winter reserve season is its own problem. Now look at equities. The rally was carried by a handful of mega-cap tech and AI stocks while most of the market went nowhere or bled. And the smart money is stepping back. US hedge funds sold equities at the fastest pace since 2017, even faster than the mid-2024 washout, mostly de-risking tech and AI after a strong run. Several chipmakers are already down 30% to 40% from their highs. The move is amplified by how much of this exposure was built with leverage, including leveraged ETFs. When price drops, forced selling feeds on itself. Korea is already seeing forced liquidations spike. ThatвҖҷs what a leveraged market looks like when confidence starts to crack. And you can see that clearly in one macro chart: вҶ’ Margin debt (money investors borrow against their portfolios to buy more stock) has hit a record high relative to US GDP. After past extremes like this, the S&P 500 lost roughly 11% on

76428.subject: вҡ”пёҸ Kimi vs the US Treasury
76428.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** The White House accused China's Moonshot of stealing Anthropic's Fable to build Kimi K3 and floated sanctions, the whole industry thinks Claude Opus 5 ships today, OpenAI is teasing a drop everyone's calling GPT-6 and Google grew revenue 24% while burning $5.9 billion in cash on AI.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Moonshot:** Did China really steal Claude?

* **Anthropic:** Is Claude Opus 5 dropping today?

* **OpenAI:** What is GPT-6 rumored to do?

* **Google:** How did record revenue still spook Wall Street?


----------

----------
## [The US says China stole Claude to build Kimi](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/treasury-threatens-sanctions-after-white-house-claims-moonshot-distilled-anthropics-fable/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/24d85486-b5c6-45ca-be19-2cf114057f2e/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_24.png?t=1784884008)
Caption: 

The White House accused a Chinese lab of stealing Anthropic's best model, and Treasury is dangling sanctions over it.

On Tuesday the White House science chief, Michael Kratsios, said Moonshot ran a large-scale distillation attack on Anthropic's Fable to build Kimi K3, the open model that sold out this month.

Distillation means training your model on another model's answers. It's common and often legal. Doing it at industrial scale on a rival's crown jewel is the part Washington is calling theft.

Treasury's Scott Bessent said open source is not open season on American IP, and put sanctions and a spot on the trade blacklist on the table.

The timeline doesn't add up. Fable only went public on July 1 and Kimi K3 shipped on the 15th.

Researchers say two weeks is nowhere near enough to copy a frontier model and then beat it, which K3 does on some coding tests.

Either Moonshot is faster than America wants to admit, or the case is thinner than the threat.


----------

----------
## [Learn the language every AI is built on](https://utm.genai.works/r/w5jfa25)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/39e0c675-d9f2-49f7-9df9-4b26f81c50ca/16.png?t=1784885606)
Follow image link: (https://academy.genai.works/courses/python-programming-mastery/details?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=academy_promotion_2026&utm_content=beehiiv_newsletter_python_jul&utm_term=w5jfa25)
Caption: 

Python runs the AI tools you use every day. If you want to build with AI instead of only using it, this is where you start.

76427.subject: DeepSeek's leaked investor call: inside the AI Playbook that erased $589 billion of Nvidia's value рҹ“ү
76427.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/deepseeks-leaked-investor-call

рҹ‘Ӣ Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 397k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
Liang Wenfeng has given roughly two interviews in his life. So when a 3-hour-44-minute recording of DeepSeekвҖҷs founder walking his new shareholders through the entire playbook (pricing math, GPU counts, the Huawei bet, a step-by-step AGI roadmap) leaked out of a May 20, 2026 closed-door meeting, it instantly became the most complete picture available of the AI lab that erased $589 billion of NvidiaвҖҷs $NVDA  market value in a single trading day in January 2025.
The meeting was LiangвҖҷs debrief for the incoming investors in DeepSeekвҖҷs first external financing ever: roughly ВҘ50 billion (~$7.4 billion) at a post-money valuation of about $52 billion, per a regulatory filing surfaced by Caixin, from Tencent, CATL, JD.com and NetEase, with Liang personally putting in around ВҘ20 billion (~$3 billion) of his own money. Within weeks, a follow-on round was reportedly in early talks at around $70 billion рҹҳі
Before we dive in, a word on sourcing. Everything below comes from a reconciled transcript, an English transcription of the audio, checked against the full Chinese text. The figures are LiangвҖҷs own claims, and DeepSeek itself has (unsurprisingly) not confirmed the documentвҖҷs authenticity. But the details keep checking out. The most telling cross-check: his pricing rule of a ten-month hardware payback, roughly sixfold profit on compute cost, lines up with the 545% theoretical inference margin DeepSeek itself disclosed publicly in March 2025. Names of some competitor models are garbled by speech recognition and are flagged where relevant.
The call breaks down into six stories: the sixfold pricing rule that turns open weights into a moat, the first on-the-record GPU numbers from any Chinese frontier lab, a one-year deadline for breaking NVIDIAвҖҷs CUDA lock-in, the org design that has half of DeepSeekвҖҷs core researchers labeling data, a dated watchlist of falsifiable claims, and a ranked map of where the opportunity moves next. More importantly, the stakes reach well past DeepSeek, since the same pricing doctrine sets the terms of competition for GLM-5.2 [ https://substack.com/redirect/30f4bebd-2aaf-48b1-8f8a-e41f6dbec831?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Kimi K3 [ https://substack.com/redirect/e9ffa71d-49a9-4597-8c3b-9a214a09f5ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the wider Chinese open-weight field.
If you build, operate, or invest anywhere near AI, the rest of this piece will pay itself back faster than LiangвҖҷs GPUs.
1. Why this meeting happened at all...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2F
